info.name: Muster Roll Service - Payments V2 (2.0.0)
info.description: Period-aware muster roll APIs with billingPeriodId, lock checks, and Kafka status publishing.

item.name: Periodic Create Muster Roll
item.description:
Creates a muster roll for a specific billing period. Validates:
- registerId must exist
- billingPeriodId links to billing configuration
- startDate < endDate within period bounds
- No duplicate muster for same register+period

Returns:
- 201: Created successfully with musterRoll object
- 400: Validation errors (invalid dates, duplicate period)
- 500: Internal server error

Publishes status to Kafka topic for attendance service sync.

item.name: Update Muster Roll (Lock Check)
item.description:
Updates muster roll with period lock validation. When locking is enabled:
- Invokes calculator `/v1/_checkBillStatus` to verify no bills exist
- Blocks update if bills already generated for the period

Returns:
- 200: Updated successfully
- 400: Validation errors or period locked
- 404: Muster roll not found
- 500: Internal server error

Publishes updated status to Kafka for attendance sync.

item.name: Search Muster Roll by Period
item.description:
Searches muster rolls filtered by billing period.

Query Parameters:
- tenantId (required): Tenant identifier
- billingPeriodId (optional): Filter by specific period
- registerId (optional): Filter by attendance register
- status (optional): Filter by muster status

Returns:
- 200: List of matching muster rolls
- 400: Invalid query parameters
- 500: Internal server error

item.name: Error: Create with Invalid Dates
item.description:
Test Case: Validates endDate >= startDate constraint.

Expected Response:
- 400 Bad Request
- Error: "End date must be after start date"

item.name: Error: Create Duplicate Period
item.description:
Test Case: Attempts to create muster for existing register+period combination.

Prerequisite: Run "Periodic Create Muster Roll" first.

Expected Response:
- 400 Bad Request
- Error: "Muster roll already exists for this register and billing period"

item.name: Error: Create with Missing Required Fields
item.description:
Test Case: Validates required field constraints.

Missing Fields:
- registerId (required)
- billingPeriodId (required)
- startDate (required)
- endDate (required)

Expected Response:
- 400 Bad Request
- Error: List of missing required fields

item.name: Error: Update Locked Period
item.description:
Test Case: Attempts to update muster when period is locked (bills already generated).

Prerequisite:
1. Create muster roll
2. Generate bills for the period
3. Attempt this update

Expected Response:
- 400 Bad Request
- Error: "Cannot modify muster roll - bills already generated for this period"
